What You See

A photorealistic, top-down triangular pit. Three gladiators. Real weight, real inertia, real falls. No HUD clutter — just physics. Push with mouse or tap. Last one inside the purple edge wins.

WASD / Arrows Move • Mouse Aim • Click or Space to Shove
